TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Jim Baechtold nilacul Jim Baechtold nalecuh i McKeesport, Pennsylvania, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Jim Baechtold i 1952 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka cacay ku uwac atu silsil tusa, namapili' tu nu Baltimore Bullets putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 12 a bulad 9 a demiad, 1927 a mihcaan, Jim Baechtold, u miunduay. (mapatay ciniza i 2011 a mihcaan) u canan ku NBA kanatal kanas-mali putiput, Amilika: National Basketball Association, sapuyu'en NBA, u Amis-Amilika tatama syubay kanas-mali putiput. izaw 30 a mali cebang, mikitinay tusa a subal, sawaliyan atu satipan. cacay subal izaw tulu a cu, cacay a cu izaw lima a cebang, cacay cebang namakay Canada, u zama sa namakay Amilika. kya madademec "Amilika syubay kanas-mali nisakaput sasasedsed, acasa "Amilika kanas nisakaput sasasedsed", sapuyu'en "Amilika syubay kanas", acasa kakelul han NBA.
S.PHON: *im ba…ô ¶ƒßtor~…æd nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ *im ba…ô ¶ƒßtor~…æd nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i m ¶k…ô…ôsport, p…ônnsjr~…æ*ania, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. *im ba…ô ¶ƒßtor~…æd i **** a miƒß ¶aan nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka ¶a ¶aj ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ tusa, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu bar~…ætimor…ô bur~…ær~…æ…ôts putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i ** a bur~…æad * a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, *im ba…ô ¶ƒßtor~…æd, u miunduaj. (mapataj ¶iniza i **** a miƒß ¶aan) u ¶anan ku nba kanatar~…æ kanas-mar~…æi putiput, amir~…æika: nationar~…æ bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ asso ¶iation, sapuju î~ °…ôn nba, u amis-amir~…æika tatama sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi putiput. izaw ** a mar~…æi ¶…ôba≈ã, mikitinaj tusa a subar~…æ, sawar~…æijan atu satipan. ¶a ¶aj subar~…æ izaw tur~…æu a ¶u, ¶a ¶aj a ¶u izaw r~…æima a ¶…ôba≈ã, ¶a ¶aj ¶…ôba≈ã namakaj ¶anada, u zama sa namakaj amir~…æika. kja madad…ôm…ô ¶ "amir~…æika sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd, a ¶asa "amir~…æika kanas nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd", sapuju î~ °…ôn "amir~…æika sjubaj kanas", a ¶asa kak…ôr~…æur~…æ ƒßan nba.
S.FORM: Jim Baechtold nilacul Jim Baechtold nalecuh i McKeesport, Pennsylvania, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Jim Baechtold i 1952 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka cacay ku uwac atu silsil tusa, namapili' tu nu Baltimore Bullets putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 12 a bulad 9 a demiad, 1927 a mihcaan, Jim Baechtold, u miunduay. (mapatay ciniza i 2011 a mihcaan) u canan ku NBA kanatal kanas-mali putiput, Amilika: National Basketball Association, sapuyu'en NBA, u Amis-Amilika tatama syubay kanas-mali putiput. izaw 30 a mali cebang, mikitinay tusa a subal, sawaliyan atu satipan. cacay subal izaw tulu a cu, cacay a cu izaw lima a cebang, cacay cebang namakay Canada, u zama sa namakay Amilika. kya madademec "Amilika syubay kanas-mali nisakaput sasasedsed, acasa "Amilika kanas nisakaput sasasedsed", sapuyu'en "Amilika syubay kanas", acasa kakelul han NBA.
S.PHON: *im ba…ô ¶ƒßtor~…æd nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ *im ba…ô ¶ƒßtor~…æd nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i m ¶k…ô…ôsport, p…ônnsjr~…æ*ania, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. *im ba…ô ¶ƒßtor~…æd i **** a miƒß ¶aan nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka ¶a ¶aj ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ tusa, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu bar~…ætimor…ô bur~…ær~…æ…ôts putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i ** a bur~…æad * a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, *im ba…ô ¶ƒßtor~…æd, u miunduaj. (mapataj ¶iniza i **** a miƒß ¶aan) u ¶anan ku nba kanatar~…æ kanas-mar~…æi putiput, amir~…æika: nationar~…æ bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ asso ¶iation, sapuju î~ °…ôn nba, u amis-amir~…æika tatama sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi putiput. izaw ** a mar~…æi ¶…ôba≈ã, mikitinaj tusa a subar~…æ, sawar~…æijan atu satipan. ¶a ¶aj subar~…æ izaw tur~…æu a ¶u, ¶a ¶aj a ¶u izaw r~…æima a ¶…ôba≈ã, ¶a ¶aj ¶…ôba≈ã namakaj ¶anada, u zama sa namakaj amir~…æika. kja madad…ôm…ô ¶ "amir~…æika sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd, a ¶asa "amir~…æika kanas nisakaput sasas…ôds…ôd", sapuju î~ °…ôn "amir~…æika sjubaj kanas", a ¶asa kak…ôr~…æur~…æ ƒßan nba.
